title: Sony’s AI graphics upscaling for PS5 Pro games is getting a big update tonight
summary: Sony's upgraded PlayStation Spectral Super Resolution (PSSR) technology is rolling out to PS5 Pro titles, addressing visual artifacts like shimmering and flickering to deliver crisper graphics. This marks the first update from AMD and Sony's Project Amethyst initiative to improve rendering quality.
content:
Sony's upgraded PlayStation Spectral Super Resolution (PSSR) technology is rolling out to several titles on the PS5 Pro, including Cyberpunk 2077, Final Fantasy VII Rebirth, Silent Hill 2, and more. Digital Foundry got a chance to test some of them and found that the "new upscaler delivers the kind of upgrade we were looking for from PS5 Pro." Problems with shimmering, flickering, and other visual artifacts have been addressed, and they said it now delivers crisper and more consistent in-game graphics. 
This is the first upgrade we've seen from AMD and Sony's combined Project Amethyst work on improving the effect of rendering a game at a lo …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 索尼PS5 Pro游戏的AI图形超分辨率技术将在今晚获得重大更新
zh.summary: 索尼升级的PlayStation光谱超分辨率（PSSR）技术正在推出到PS5 Pro游戏中，解决闪烁和抖动等视觉伪影，提供更清晰的图形。这是AMD和索尼Project Amethyst计划改进渲染质量的首次更新。

fr.title: La technologie d'amélioration graphique IA de Sony pour PS5 Pro reçoit une mise à jour majeure ce soir
fr.summary: La technologie PlayStation Spectral Super Resolution (PSSR) améliorée de Sony est déployée sur les titres PS5 Pro, corrigeant les artefacts visuels tels que le scintillement et le tremblotement pour fournir des graphiques plus nets. Il s'agit de la première mise à jour de l'initiative Project Amethyst d'AMD et Sony pour améliorer la qualité du rendu.

de.title: Sonys KI-Grafik-Upscaling für PS5 Pro-Spiele erhält heute Abend ein großes Update
de.summary: Sonys verbesserte PlayStation Spectral Super Resolution (PSSR)-Technologie wird auf PS5 Pro-Titel ausgerollt und behebt visuelle Artefakte wie Flimmern und Zittern, um schärfere Grafiken zu liefern. Dies ist das erste Update der Project Amethyst-Initiative von AMD und Sony zur Verbesserung der Renderqualität.

es.title: La tecnología de upscaling gráfico con IA de Sony para PS5 Pro recibe una gran actualización esta noche
es.summary: La tecnología mejorada PlayStation Spectral Super Resolution (PSSR) de Sony se está implementando en títulos de PS5 Pro, abordando artefactos visuales como el parpadeo para proporcionar gráficos más nítidos. Esta es la primera actualización de la iniciativa Project Amethyst de AMD y Sony para mejorar la calidad del renderizado.

title: How to watch Jensen Huang’s Nvidia GTC 2026 keynote — and what to expect
summary: Nvidia's flagship GTC 2026 event will feature CEO Jensen Huang's keynote focused on the company's vision for AI and computing, where Nvidia typically announces new products and strategic partnerships.
content: GTC is Nvidia's flagship annual event, where the chipmaker typically announces new products, partnerships, and its vision for the future of computing. Huang's keynote will focus on Nvidia's role in the future of computing and AI.

zh.title: 如何观看詹森·黄的英伟达GTC 2026主题演讲——以及期待什么

es.summary: El evento GTC 2026 insignia de Nvidia presentará el discurso de apertura del CEO Jensen Huang enfocado en la visión de la empresa para IA e informática, donde Nvidia típicamente anuncia nuevos productos y asociaciones estratégicas.

title: Another deep tech chip startup becomes a unicorn: Frore hits $1.64B
summary: Deep tech chip startup Frore has achieved unicorn status at $1.64 billion valuation after raising $143 million, following the development of liquid-cooling technology for chips at Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's suggestion.
content: At Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's urging, Frore developed liquid-cooling tech for chips. That shift helped it just raise $143 million.

zh.summary: 深科技芯片初创公司Frore在融资1.43亿美元后达到16.4亿美元估值的独角兽地位，这是在英伟达首席执行官詹森·黄的建议下开发芯片液冷技术之后。

fr.title: Une autre startup de puces deep tech devient une licorne : Frore atteint 1,64 milliard de dollars
fr.summary: La startup de puces deep tech Frore a atteint le statut de licorne avec une valorisation de 1,64 milliard de dollars après avoir levé 143 millions de dollars, suite au développement de la technologie de refroidissement liquide pour les puces sur suggestion du PDG de Nvidia, Jensen Huang.

de.title: Noch ein Deep-Tech-Chip-Startup wird zu einem Einhorn: Frore erreicht 1,64 Milliarden Dollar
de.summary: Das Deep-Tech-Chip-Startup Frore hat nach einer Fundraising von 143 Millionen Dollar die Einhornstellung mit einer Bewertung von 1,64 Milliarden Dollar erreicht, nachdem es auf Vorschlag von Nvidia-CEO Jensen Huang eine Flüssigkühlungstechnologie für Chips entwickelt hat.

es.title: Otro startup de chips de tecnología profunda se convierte en unicornio: Frore alcanza $1.64 mil millones

title: Fuse raises $25M  to disrupt aging loan origination systems used by U.S. credit unions
summary: Fuse raised $25 million to modernize legacy loan origination systems at U.S. credit unions with its AI-native platform, launching a $5 million fund to help institutions transition away from outdated software.
content: The startup also announced a $5M 'rescue fund' to help credit unions ditch legacy software for its AI-native platform.

title: The dictionary sues OpenAI
summary: Encyclopedia Britannica and Merriam-Webster sued OpenAI, alleging the company used nearly 100,000 copyrighted articles without permission to train its language models.
content: Encyclopedia Britannica and Merriam-Webster say that OpenAI violated the copyright of almost 100,000 articles by using them for LLM training.

fr.summary: L'Encyclopédie Britannica et Merriam-Webster ont poursuivi OpenAI, alléguant que la compagnie a utilisé près de 100 000 articles protégés par le droit d'auteur sans permission pour entraîner ses modèles linguistiques.

es.summary: Encyclopedia Britannica y Merriam-Webster demandaron a OpenAI, alegando que la compañía utilizó casi 100,000 artículos con derechos de autor sin permiso para entrenar sus modelos de lenguaje.

title: Encyclopedia Britannica is suing OpenAI for allegedly ‘memorizing’ its content with ChatGPT
summary: Amazon's Fire TV Stick 4K Max and 4K Plus models are discounted up to 50 percent during the early Big Spring Sale, featuring a redesigned Fire TV OS with improved recommendations and Alexa Plus voice control.
content:
On Friday, Encyclopedia Britannica and dictionary publisher Merriam-Webster filed a lawsuit against OpenAI alleging that it used their copyrighted content to train its AI, then generated responses that were "substantially similar" to their content, as previously reported by Reuters. 
According to Britannica, OpenAI repeatedly copied its content without permission, stating, "GPT-4 itself has 'memorized' much of Britannica's copyrighted content and will output near-verbatim copies of significant portions on demand. The memorized examples are unauthorized copies that [OpenAI] used to train their models, including GPT-4." 
The lawsuit goes on  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Amazon’s Fire TV Stick 4K Max and 4K Plus sticks are up to 50 percent off
summary: Apple is releasing updated AirPods Max in April with the new H2 chip and enhanced active noise cancellation, representing the first major update to the over-ear headphones in over five years.
content:
Since Amazon rolled out its redesigned Fire TV OS, Amazon’s latest streaming sticks are even better than ever. And right now, both the Fire TV Stick 4K Max and Fire TV Stick 4K Plus are back at their best prices yet during Amazon’s early Big Spring Sale event. You can buy the Fire TV Stick 4K Max for $34.99 ($25 off) at Amazon, Best Buy, and Target, while the Fire TV Stick 4K Plus is down to $24.99 ($25 off) at the same retailers (Amazon, Best Buy, and Target).
Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Max (2023)

Where to Buy:

 $59.99 $34.99 at Amazon
 $59.99 $34.99 at Best Buy
 $59.99 $34.99 at Target


Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Plus

Where to Buy:

 $49.99 $24.99 at Target
 $49.99 $24.99 at Amazon
 $49.99 $24.99 at Best Buy

The updated Fire TV OS makes it easier to find something to watch no matter which model you choose. It pulls recommendations from your subscriptions and adds tabs across the top of your screen for categories like TV shows, news, sports, and live content, so you can quickly jump to what you want to watch. There’s also a redesigned apps row that lets you pin up to 20 favorites instead of just six, making it quicker to jump between services. You can also navigate with your voice thanks to support for Alexa Plus, which lets you issue specific commands like asking it to open ESPN on Sling TV, search for particular scenes or content, check sports scores, or control compatible smart home devices. You even use the remote to quickly view feeds from devices like Ring cameras. 
The biggest differences between the two sticks mainly come down to hardware. As the higher-end option, the Fire TV Stick 4K Max comes with a few extra features. Both models support Dolby Vision and Dolby Atmos, but the Fire TV Stick 4K Max offers double the storage at 16GB along with support for Wi-Fi 6E instead of Wi-Fi 6 for faster connectivity. It also comes with Amazon’s Alexa Voice Remote Enhanced, which adds extra shortcuts like a button for quick access to live TV channel listings.

zh.summary: 苹果将在4月发布更新的AirPods Max，配备新的H2芯片和增强的主动降噪功能，这是该头戴式耳机五年多来的首次重大更新。

title: Amazon’s best Echo speakers and screens just got their biggest discounts
summary: Yahoo CEO Jim Lanzone discusses the company's strategy as an independent entity, focusing on growth in email, sports, and finance while launching AI-powered search features to compete in the search market.
content:
While Amazon’s previous lineup of Echo speakers and smart displays was boring, frankly, its late 2025 hardware refresh brought better hardware, improved performance, and Alexa Plus to several models. If you feel like your room(s) could benefit from speakers to deliver tunes, audiobooks, or podcasts to more corners of your home, or screens to show recipes, photos, or videos, there are some great early Big Spring Sale deals that are worth checking out.
In terms of smart displays, Amazon’s Echo Show 11 is a great deal at $169.99 (was $219.99), while the smaller Echo Show 8 with an 8.7-inch screen is $139.99 (was $179.99). Our Jennifer Pattison Tuohy has used both, and considers their screens “light-years ahead” of the previous model, though the larger device has a 1080p screen while the smaller is at 720p resolution. Moving to speakers, the $189.99 (usually $219.99) Echo Studio gives the Apple HomePod 2 a run for its money, with room-filling sound and Atmos support. Even Amazon’s smaller, cheaper Echo Dot Max at $74.99 (was $99.99) is a solid value, thanks to its improved design and performance.
Here are all of the deals in one place:
Echo Show 11
The Echo Show 11 features an 11-inch screen and 1080p resolution. It includes Alexa Plus and can be used as a smart home hub, supporting Thread, Matter, and Zigbee smart home protocols.

Where to Buy:

 $219.99 $169.99 at Amazon
 $219.99 $169.99 at Best Buy

Echo Show 8
The updated Echo Show 8 features an 8.7-inch display with 720p resolution, wider viewing angles, and higher contrast. It includes a 13MP camera, new stereo speakers, and supports Alexa Plus, while doubling as a smart home hub with support for Zigbee, Matter, and Thread.

Where to Buy:

 $179.99 $139.99 at Amazon
 $179.99 $139.99 at Best Buy

Amazon Echo Studio (2025)
The latest Echo Studio is 40 percent smaller than its predecessor, but packs better sound. It’s the better choice compared to the Echo Dot Max if you intend to listen to a lot of spatial audio. Re

title: Yahoo CEO Jim Lanzone on reviving the web’s homepage
summary: YouTuber Simone Giertz's Laundry Chair, priced at $1,100 and available through Kickstarter, features a rotating rail that stores half-clean clothes without covering the seat, solving a common household problem.
content:
Today, I’m talking with Jim Lanzone, who is the CEO of Yahoo.
It’s basically impossible to sum up the Yahoo story, but the short version of it is that a long time ago Yahoo paid Google to run the search box on its website, and basically everything has gone sideways since. You’ll hear Jim refer to that deal as Yahoo’s original sin, actually. After a long series of mergers and spinouts and an extremely odd moment where it was part of Verizon, Yahoo is once again an independent, privately held company. And it has big properties in sports and finance, and, against all odds, email, where it’s growing with young people. Gen Z loves Yahoo Mail, people. You heard it here first.
All of that means Yahoo is profitable and growing, according to Jim, but I still had some big questions about where that growth is going. Yahoo is still the third-place search engine and it just launched a new AI-powered search called Scout, but are they really trying to take market share from Google? Is the big investment in traditional advertising a good bet when creators and influencers are taking up so much attention? And with so much of both sports and finance turning into straight-up gambling, does Jim have any red lines he won’t cross with two of the biggest apps on the internet?



Verge subscribers, don’t forget you get exclusive access to ad-free Decoder wherever you get your podcasts. Head here. Not a subscriber? You can sign up here. 
There’s a lot in this one, including some wild Decoder org chart terminology and what amounts to two people with a long history on the internet trying to come up with ever deeper references to old memes. It’s a ride, and Jim was pretty much game. 
Jim was also a huge nerd about ad tech, and we used a lot of vocabulary talking about his decision to shut down part of Yahoo’s ad business and invest in the part that’s growing. Here’s a quick rundown — feel free to come back to this if it’s too wonky, I promise you’ll get it, it’s not that hard.
A supply-side pla

title: This chair gives half-worn clothes a home
summary:
Lets be honest, most of us are probably tossing our half-clean clothes on furniture or flooring anyway. | Image by Simone Giertz / Yetch	

Seating technology may have reached its peak for those of us
content:
Lets be honest, most of us are probably tossing our half-clean clothes on furniture or flooring anyway. | Image by Simone Giertz / Yetch	

Seating technology may have reached its peak for those of us who struggle to keep our lightly worn clothing piles away from furniture. The Laundry Chair - developed by YouTuber and viral inventor Simone Giertz - is now available to buy through a Kickstarter campaign, providing a storage solution that still functions as a usable seat when it's covered in clothes that are too clean to wash, but too dirty to put away.
The $1,100 Laundry Chair includes a rotating rail that can swivel around the seat on a ball-bearing Lazy Susan, allowing laundry to be slung over it without covering the armrests or seating pad. The chair also features a solid ha …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: The classic Apple Macintosh mouse inspired Spigen’s retro AirPods case
summary: Spigen has created a retro Macintosh-inspired case for AirPods Pro 3 that resembles the iconic single-button mouse from the 1980s. Priced at $29.99, the case maintains full functionality with accessible USB-C port and status LED. This follows Spigen's earlier release of Macintosh-inspired iPhone cases.
content:
If you've already given your iPhone 17 Pro and Pro Max a retro '80s facelift with Spigen's Macintosh 128K and Apple Lisa-inspired Classic LS cases, you might as well make your wireless earbuds match. But instead of making the AirPods Pro 3 look like a decades-old desktop computer, Spigen's case turns them into a replica of the Macintosh's iconic single-button mouse.
The $29.99 case is available through Amazon and comes in two parts that attach to the bottom and hinged lid of the AirPods Pro 3's charging case. Even wrapped in its vintage disguise the case can still open as designed, and its USB-C port and status LED are still accessible. Spi …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 经典苹果麦金塔鼠标启发Spigen复古AirPods保护套
zh.summary: Spigen创造了一个复古的麦金塔风格保护套，适用于AirPods Pro 3，外形类似1980年代的标志性单按钮鼠标。该保护套价格为29.99美元，保持完全功能，配有易于使用的USB-C端口和状态LED。这是Spigen之前发布麦金塔风格iPhone保护套的后续产品。

Avec un prix de 29,99 $, le boîtier conserve toutes les fonctionnalités avec un port USB-C accessible et un voyant d'état. Cela suit la sortie antérieure par Spigen de boîtiers iPhone inspirés par Macintosh.

Mit einem Preis von $29,99 behält das Gehäuse die volle Funktionalität mit zugänglichem USB-C-Anschluss und Status-LED bei. Dies folgt auf die frühere Veröffentlichung von Macintosh-inspirierten iPhone-Gehäusen durch Spigen.

Con un precio de $29.99, el estuche mantiene toda la funcionalidad con puerto USB-C accesible e indicador LED. Esto sigue el lanzamiento anterior de Spigen de estuches de iPhone inspirados en Macintosh.

title: OpenAI’s adult mode will reportedly be smutty, not pornographic
summary: OpenAI's delayed 'adult mode' for ChatGPT will support adult-themed text conversations at launch, though the feature will not include image, voice, or video generation capabilities. The feature, initially announced in October, represents OpenAI's effort to balance user demand for less restricted content with safety considerations.
content:
So when exactly is smut considered porn? | Cath Virginia / The Verge | Photos from Getty Images	

OpenAI's delayed "adult mode" for ChatGPT is expected to support saucy text conversations at launch, but not the chatbot's ability to generate images, voice, or video. Speaking to The Wall Street Journal, an unnamed OpenAI spokesperson described content that will be provided by the upcoming feature as smut rather than pornography, allowing ChatGPT users to generate textual chats with adult themes.
The feature was initially announced in October, with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman claiming that the company had managed to mitigate enough of the "serious mental health issues" with its AI model to relax safety restrictions and introduce "erotica for ver …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 据报道OpenAI的成人模式将是不雅的，而非色情的
zh.summary: OpenAI推迟的ChatGPT"成人模式"将在推出时支持成人主题的文本对话，尽管该功能不会包括图像、语音或视频生成能力。该功能最初在10月宣布，代表OpenAI在平衡用户对更少限制内容的需求与安全考虑方面的努力。

fr.title: Le mode adulte d'OpenAI serait prétentieux, pas pornographique
fr.summary: Le mode « adulte » différé d'OpenAI pour ChatGPT supportera les conversations textuelles à thème adulte au lancement, bien que la fonction n'inclura pas les capacités de génération d'image, de voix ou de vidéo. La fonction, initialement annoncée en octobre, représente l'effort d'OpenAI pour équilibrer la demande des utilisateurs pour un contenu moins restrictif avec les considérations de sécurité.

de.title: OpenAIs Erwachsenenmodus soll Berichten zufolge anzüglich, aber nicht pornografisch sein
de.summary: OpenAI's verzögerter "Erwachsenenmodus" für ChatGPT wird zum Start Gespräche zu Erwachsenenmaterial unterstützen, obwohl die Funktion keine Bild-, Sprach- oder Videogenerierungsfunktionen beinhaltet. Die Funktion, die im Oktober angekündigt wurde, stellt OpenAI's Bemühung dar, die Nachfrage der Nutzer nach weniger eingeschränktem Inhalt mit Sicherheitsaspekten auszugleichen.

es.title: El modo adulto de OpenAI será presuntamente picante, no pornográfico
es.summary: El modo "adulto" retrasado de OpenAI para ChatGPT admitirá conversaciones de texto de temática adulta en el lanzamiento, aunque la función no incluirá capacidades de generación de imágenes, voz o video. La función, anunciada inicialmente en octubre, representa el esfuerzo de OpenAI por equilibrar la demanda de los usuarios de contenido menos restringido con consideraciones de seguridad.

content: "I realized that if something went wrong up there, things might go very badly down here."

L'article célèbre les moments décisifs de l'exploration spatiale à travers les perspectives d'experts du secteur.

title: My fitness tracker is a secret weapon against my chronic illness
summary: Arielle Duhaime-Ross describes how a fitness tracker has become crucial in managing her chronic illness, allowing her to track physical limitations and avoid dangerous overexertion. The article shares her personal experience of a severe crash after exercise in 2023, highlighting the importance of monitoring her body's responses.
content:
Arielle Duhaime-Ross does a bike tune-up. | Photo by Evan Ortiz / The Verge	

One of the first major crashes I experienced as a chronically ill person happened on an unusually sunny January day in New York City. It was 2023, and I was riding my bike with a friend, flying high from the exercise. We'd covered just over 40 miles on mostly flat ground, a longish ride, but not out of ordinary for me. And that's when it started. About 15 minutes from my apartment, my body gave out. 
At first it was just my head - it grew hot, and within minutes, my brain felt like it was on fire. Pretty soon, the rest of my insides were burning up, too. As the skin on my arms and face turned red, and my limbs grew heavy, I felt bewildered. …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我的健身追踪器是对抗慢性疾病的秘密武器
zh.summary: Arielle Duhaime-Ross描述了健身追踪器在管理她的慢性疾病中是如何变得至关重要的，它使她能够追踪身体限制并避免危险的过度劳累。这篇文章分享了她2023年运动后严重崩溃的个人经历，突出了监测她身体反应的重要性。

fr.title: Mon suivi de fitness est une arme secrète contre ma maladie chronique
fr.summary: Arielle Duhaime-Ross décrit comment un suivi de fitness est devenu crucial pour gérer sa maladie chronique, lui permettant de suivre les limitations physiques et d'éviter l'effort dangereux. L'article partage son expérience personnelle d'un effondrement grave après l'exercice en 2023, soulignant l'importance de surveiller les réactions de son corps.

de.title: Mein Fitness-Tracker ist eine Geheimwaffe gegen meine chronische Krankheit
de.summary: Arielle Duhaime-Ross beschreibt, wie ein Fitness-Tracker entscheidend für die Bewältigung ihrer chronischen Krankheit geworden ist und es ihr ermöglicht, körperliche Einschränkungen zu verfolgen und gefährliche Überanstrengung zu vermeiden. Der Artikel teilt ihre persönliche Erfahrung eines schweren Zusammenbruchs nach dem Training 2023 und unterstreicht die Bedeutung der Überwachung der Reaktionen ihres Körpers.

El artículo comparte su experiencia personal de un colapso grave después del ejercicio en 2023, destacando la importancia de monitorear las respuestas de su cuerpo.

title: The billionaires made a promise — now some want out
summary: The Giving Pledge, launched by Warren Buffett and Bill Gates in 2010, asked the world's wealthiest people to publicly commit to giving away more than half their fortune during their lifetime or upon death. Now, some signatories are backing away from their commitment. This raises questions about the pledge's effectiveness and accountability among the ultra-wealthy.
content: In 2010, Warren Buffett and Bill Gates launched a disarmingly simple campaign they called the Giving Pledge: a public commitment, open to the world’s wealthiest people, to give away more than half their fortune during their lifetime or upon their death. The moment seemed to call for it. Tech was minting billionaires faster than any […]

zh.title: 亿万富翁做出承诺——现在有些人想退出
zh.summary: 由沃伦·巴菲特和比尔·盖茨在2010年启动的《捐赠誓言》要求全球最富有的人公开承诺在其一生中或去世后捐出超过一半的财富。现在，一些签署人正在放弃他们的承诺。这引发了人们对该誓言有效性和超富人士问责制的质疑。

fr.title: Les milliardaires ont fait une promesse — certains veulent maintenant se retirer
fr.summary: Le Giving Pledge, lancé par Warren Buffett et Bill Gates en 2010, a demandé aux personnes les plus riches du monde de s'engager publiquement à donner plus de la moitié de leur fortune au cours de leur vie ou à leur décès. Maintenant, certains signataires se retirent de leur engagement. Cela soulève des questions sur l'efficacité du serment et la responsabilité parmi les ultra-riches.

de.title: Die Milliardäre machten ein Versprechen — jetzt wollen einige aussteigen
de.summary: Das Giving Pledge, das 2010 von Warren Buffett und Bill Gates ins Leben gerufen wurde, forderte die reichsten Menschen der Welt auf, sich öffentlich zu verpflichten, mehr als die Hälfte ihres Vermögens während ihres Lebens oder bei ihrem Tod zu spenden. Nun ziehen sich einige Unterzeichner von ihrem Engagement zurück. Dies wirft Fragen zur Wirksamkeit des Versprechens und zur Rechenschaftspflicht unter den Superreichen auf.

es.title: Los multimillonarios hicieron una promesa — ahora algunos quieren retirarse
es.summary: El Giving Pledge, lanzado por Warren Buffett y Bill Gates en 2010, pidió a las personas más ricas del mundo que se comprometieran públicamente a donar más de la mitad de su fortuna durante su vida o después de su muerte. Ahora, algunos firmantes se están retractando de su compromiso. Esto plantea preguntas sobre la efectividad del compromiso y la responsabilidad entre los ultraricos.

title: Netflix’s ‘Frankenstein’ wins three Oscars, ‘KPop Demon Hunters’ wins two
summary: Netflix's "Frankenstein" and "KPop Demon Hunters" dominated the Oscars with five wins combined. "Frankenstein" won three awards in design and styling categories, while "KPop Demon Hunters" claimed Best Animated Feature and Best Original Song. The wins underscore Netflix's growing influence in major award competitions.
content: “Frankenstein” won for Best Production Design, Best Costume Design, and Best Makeup and Hairstyling, while “KPop Demon Hunters” won for Best Animated Feature and Best Original Song.

zh.title: Netflix的《弗兰肯斯坦》赢得三项奥斯卡奖，《K流行恶魔猎人》赢得两项
zh.summary: Netflix的《弗兰肯斯坦》和《K流行恶魔猎人》在奥斯卡颁奖典礼上合计赢得五项奖。《弗兰肯斯坦》在设计和风格类别中赢得三项奖，而《K流行恶魔猎人》获得最佳动画长片和最佳原创歌曲。这些胜利凸显了Netflix在主要奖项竞赛中日益增长的影响力。

fr.title: 'Frankenstein' de Netflix remporte trois Oscars, 'KPop Demon Hunters' en remporte deux
fr.summary: "Frankenstein" et "KPop Demon Hunters" de Netflix ont dominé les Oscars avec cinq victoires au total. "Frankenstein" a remporté trois prix dans les catégories de conception et de style, tandis que "KPop Demon Hunters" a remporté le meilleur long métrage d'animation et la meilleure chanson originale. Ces victoires soulignent l'influence croissante de Netflix dans les grandes compétitions de prix.

de.title: Netflixs 'Frankenstein' gewinnt drei Oscars, 'KPop Demon Hunters' gewinnt zwei
de.summary: Netflixs "Frankenstein" und "KPop Demon Hunters" dominierten die Oscars mit insgesamt fünf Siegen. "Frankenstein" gewann drei Auszeichnungen in den Kategorien Design und Styling, während "KPop Demon Hunters" Best Animated Feature und Best Original Song erhielt. Die Siege unterstreichen Netflixs wachsenden Einfluss bei großen Preisbewerben.

es.title: El 'Frankenstein' de Netflix gana tres Oscars, 'KPop Demon Hunters' gana dos
es.summary: "Frankenstein" y "KPop Demon Hunters" de Netflix dominaron los Oscars con cinco victorias combinadas. "Frankenstein" ganó tres premios en categorías de diseño y estilo, mientras que "KPop Demon Hunters" se llevó Mejor Largometraje Animado y Mejor Canción Original. Los premios subrayan la creciente influencia de Netflix en las principales competencias de premios.

title: Google, Accel India accelerator choses 5 startups and none are ‘AI wrappers’
summary: Google and Accel's India accelerator selected 5 startups from over 4,000 applications, notably excluding AI wrapper companies that simply repackage existing models. The choice reflects investor preference for startups building substantive, differentiated AI applications rather than thin layers on existing technology.
content: Google and Accel say about 70% of AI startup pitches tied to India were "wrappers" as they reviewed more than 4,000 applications for their Atoms cohort.

zh.title: Google和Accel印度加速器选择5家初创公司，都不是"AI包装器"
zh.summary: Google和Accel的印度加速器从超过4000份申请中选择了5家初创公司，值得注意的是排除了那些简单地重新包装现有模型的AI包装器公司。这一选择反映了投资者对构建实质性、差异化AI应用的初创公司的偏好，而不是现有技术上的薄层。

fr.title: Google et l'accélérateur Accel India choisissent 5 startups et aucune n'est un "wrapper IA"
fr.summary: L'accélérateur indien de Google et Accel a sélectionné 5 startups parmi plus de 4000 candidatures, excluant notamment les entreprises de wrapper IA qui se contentent de réempaqueter les modèles existants. Ce choix reflète la préférence des investisseurs pour les startups construisant des applications IA substantielles et différenciées plutôt que des couches minces sur la technologie existante.

de.title: Google und Accel India Accelerator wählen 5 Startups aus, keine sind "KI-Wrapper"
de.summary: Der indische Beschleuniger von Google und Accel hat 5 Startups aus über 4000 Bewerbungen ausgewählt und bezeichnenderweise KI-Wrapper-Unternehmen ausgeschlossen, die einfach nur bestehende Modelle neu verpacken. Die Auswahl spiegelt die Präferenz der Investoren für Startups wider, die substanzielle, differenzierte KI-Anwendungen aufbauen, anstatt nur dünne Schichten auf bestehender Technologie zu schaffen.

es.title: Google y el acelerador Accel India eligen 5 startups y ninguna es un "envoltorio de IA"
es.summary: El acelerador indio de Google y Accel seleccionó 5 startups de más de 4000 solicitudes, excluyendo notablemente a empresas de envoltorio de IA que simplemente reempaquetan modelos existentes. La elección refleja la preferencia de los inversores por startups que construyen aplicaciones de IA sustanciales y diferenciadas en lugar de capas delgadas sobre tecnología existente.
